text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Tolerance amend happens BEFORE the GRN so the three-way match reconciles against the physical count. One GRN per partial shipment; a full-contract PO line (e.g. 100000 bottles) may be received in many lots, each its own GRN, against the same line until cumulative >= ordered. No-tolerance
items skip the band check entirely.
